title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Thomas Cook India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Thomas Cook India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Thomas Cook India in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Thomas Cook India:
Thomas Cook India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thomas Cook India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
